progress.area: M1.4 Pipeline AI / Inbox AI policy preservation

scope: AI suggestions must follow the latest client message and full-thread context
Email CTA must prefer texted/conversation email before lead-list email
Follow-up suggestions must respect explicit callback windows and not stale funding-link copy
Inbound conversation owner must not auto-reassign away from existing active owner
Active inbound threads can be replied to during quiet hours while cold outbound remains blocked
AI extracted fields must persist and render from stable conversation fields

aiSuggestionRepair: Context-aware deterministic repair for email shares, amount disclosures, fees/rate/payment questions, credit-score objections, callback logistics, HELOC/LOC clarification, term-range replies, and follow-up windows
Client email is no longer reused as the rep sender address in AI draft copy
Stale generic/funding-link suggestions are replaced when the latest inbound topic changed
implementation.emailPolicy: Conversation detail resolves recipient priority as texted email -> lead email -> contact email and passes knownEmail/emailReceived into AI suggestion repair.
ownerActionReclassification: Reply sent, status changes, note added, and add-to-pipeline actions trigger safe async reclassification
Note-added path performs fast local extraction for revenue, ask, industry, and HELOC fit before full LLM refresh
Rep classification disagreement is logged for future feedback corpus when manual actions contradict AI classification
implementation.ownershipPolicy: Inbound webhook preserves current active conversation/lead owner before considering latest active human sender.
implementation.quietHoursPolicy: Manual replies in threads with inbound history bypass quiet hours; cold/manual outreach still enforces quiet hours.
implementation.uiRendering: Inbox AI card/banner render persisted extractedRevenue, extractedAsk, extractedIndustry, and helocFitFlag fallbacks when aiSignals are partial.

validation.command: cd server && npx vitest run tests/aiSuggestionPolicy.test.ts tests/inboxReplyReclassification.test.ts tests/classificationFeedbackDisagreement.test.ts tests/inboundOwnershipPolicy.test.ts tests/conversationEmailPolicy.test.ts tests/followupPolicy.test.ts tests/clientPreservationRequirements.test.ts tests/dealOwnershipPreservation.test.ts tests/dealControllerScope.test.ts tests/complianceKeywordParser.test.ts tests/aiClassificationEligibility.test.ts tests/aiServiceComplianceScoring.test.ts
cd server && npx vitest run tests/aiSuggestionPolicy.test.ts tests/compliance.test.ts tests/inboxReplyReclassification.test.ts && npm run build
validation.note: compliance.test DB-backed cases are skipped without a local MySQL DATABASE_URL

validation.command: VS Code get_errors on changed AI/Inbox files

remainingM14Work: Dedicated pipelineAiService with exact handoff prompt/schema
Golden extractor grading and per-deal serialization queue
DealPanel AI inline bar and re-run AI action
knownLimitations: This gate repairs Inbox AI policy and owner-action AI refresh; it does not complete the dedicated Pipeline AI extractor backend.
Local DB-backed compliance integration tests remain skipped because local DATABASE_URL is not MySQL in this environment.
